_comment: Notion MCP — search and read Notion pages, databases, and workspace content. Useful for teams that keep architecture docs, ADRs, runbooks, or project specs in Notion.
_install: claude mcp add notion -s user -e OPENAPI_MCP_HEADERS -- npx -y @notionhq/notion-mcp-server
_security: Requires a Notion integration token. Grant read-only access in Notion settings. Only share specific pages/databases with the integration — not the entire workspace.
